body_txt: Everyone knows Real Dreams are Weirder . For every prophetic dream there is, there's at least twenty that are complete nonsense, concocted by the inscrutable forces of your mind. Giant kittens can overrun cities, purple carrots can fly through space, and you can temporarily depart from your heterosexuality . The Erotic Dream is a strange thing, and one of its many byproducts is causing straight characters to dream up relationships with members of their own gender. Homoerotic dreams, like most, are (probably) completely meaningless in reality. That won't stop the character who experienced the dream from feeling unnerved by their bizarre fantasies, causing them to have a brief crisis over their sexuality. It may prove even more awkward for the unassuming character who appeared in the dream, in the scenario that they find out. This trope is more often than not Played for Laughs , riffing on the discomfort surrounding one's own assumed sexuality. However, such a dream could also unveil a character's subconscious feelings, displaying the desires that they unknowingly feel. This can serve to undermine their heterosexuality and pave the way to a LGBT Awakening . Compare Stupid Sexy Flanders , another cause of temporary confusion and embarrassment for heterosexual characters.
